claims.notes: Open-source Python CLI tool generating tailored AI Agent Bill of Rights documents in Markdown and PDF, grounded in IEEE EAD, EU AI Act, and Asilomar frameworks. Includes 10-rights catalogue, profile-driven selection, 3 example profiles, and 3 sample outputs.

claude.reasoning: The submission provides a public GitHub repository with a working Python CLI tool that generates tailored AI Agent Bill of Rights documents, satisfying the core deliverable. It references all three required AI ethics frameworks (IEEE Ethically Aligned Design, EU AI Act, and Asilomar AI Principles), includes a 10-rights catalogue with profile-driven selection, and provides the three sample generated Bill of Rights documents demonstrating varied agent profiles as specified. The repository includes a README with installation and usage documentation, and the tool produces output in both Markdown and PDF formats, meeting all stated requirements of the bounty.
